$userId..write: auth != null && $userId === auth.uid && newData.child('email').val() === auth.token.email && newData.child('puzzlesCompleted').val() === data.child('puzzlesCompleted').val()
$userId..validate: newData.hasChildren(['displayName', 'email', 'uniqueId', 'createdAt']) && newData.child('displayName').isString() && newData.child('displayName').val().length > 0 && newData.child('displayName').val().length <= 80 && newData.child('email').isString() && newData.child('uniqueId').val() === auth.uid && newData.child('createdAt').isNumber()

$pieceId..validate: newData.hasChildren(['id', 'position', 'targetPosition', 'rotation', 'isPlaced']) && newData.child('id').val() === $pieceId && newData.child('position').hasChildren(['x', 'y']) && newData.child('position/x').isNumber() && newData.child('position/y').isNumber() && newData.child('targetPosition').hasChildren(['x', 'y']) && newData.child('targetPosition/x').isNumber() && newData.child('targetPosition/y').isNumber() && newData.child('rotation').isNumber() && newData.child('isPlaced').isBoolean()

$puzzleId..write: auth != null && ((!data.exists() && newData.child('createdBy').val() === auth.uid) || data.child('createdBy').val() === auth.uid)
$puzzleId..validate: newData.hasChildren(['imageUrl', 'pieceCount', 'difficulty', 'createdAt', 'createdBy']) && newData.child('imageUrl').isString() && newData.child('pieceCount').isNumber() && newData.child('pieceCount').val() >= 4 && newData.child('pieceCount').val() <= 2000 && (newData.child('difficulty').val() === 'easy' || newData.child('difficulty').val() === 'medium' || newData.child('difficulty').val() === 'hard') && newData.child('createdAt').isNumber() && newData.child('createdBy').isString()
